supply_list.source_quote: Measure the arm circumference with a MUAC strap

variables.source_quote: If any danger sign, REFER URGENTLY
Do a rapid diagnostic test (RDT) for malaria Positive Negative

variables.display_name: Identify Problems - ASK and LOOK - completed flag
Danger Sign Check and Referral Decision - completed flag
Diarrhoea Treatment - ORS and Zinc - completed flag
Fast Breathing Treatment - Amoxicillin - completed flag
Fever/Malaria Treatment - RDT and AL - completed flag
Home Care Advice and Follow-Up Scheduling - completed flag
Malnutrition Screening - MUAC and Oedema - completed flag

variables.source_quote: If any danger sign, REFER URGENTLY to health facility
Fast breathing: Age 2 months up to 12 months: 50bpm ormore Age 12 months up to 5 years: 40bpm ormore
Cough? If YES, for how long? _3_days
IF YES, for how long? days.
Cough? If YES, for how long?
Diarrhoea (3 ormore loose stools in 24 hours)?

variables.display_name: Not able to drink or feed anything
variables.source_quote: not able to drink or feed anything?
complete a recording form for every sick child
MUAC strap colour: Red Yellow Green
count breaths in 1 minute: breaths per minute (bpm)

predicates.human_label: Child age 12 months up to 5 years
predicates.source_quote: Age 12 months up to 5 years: 40bpm ormore

predicates.human_label: Child age 2 months up to 12 months
predicates.source_quote: Age 2 months up to 12 months: 50bpm ormore

predicates.human_label: Child age 2 months up to 3 years
predicates.source_quote: Age 2 months up to 3 years - 1 tablet

predicates.human_label: Child age 2 months up to 6 months
predicates.source_quote: Age 2 months up to 6 months - half tablet

predicates.human_label: Child age 3 years up to 5 years
predicates.source_quote: Age 3 years up to 5 years - 2 tablet

predicates.human_label: Child age 6 months up to 5 years
predicates.source_quote: Age 6 months up to 5 years - 1 tablet

predicates.threshold_expression: p_cough_14_days_or_more == true OR p_diarrhoea_14_days_or_more == true OR q_blood_in_stool == true OR p_fever_7_days_or_more == true OR q_convulsions == true OR q_not_able_to_drink_or_feed == true OR q_vomits_everything == true OR ex_chest_indrawing == true OR ex_unusually_sleepy_or_unconscious == true OR v_muac_strap_colour == 'red' OR ex_swelling_both_feet == true
predicates.human_label: Any danger sign present
predicates.source_quote: If any danger sign, REFER URGENTLY to health facility

predicates.human_label: Child can drink
predicates.source_quote: If child can drink

predicates.human_label: Cough for 14 days or more (danger sign)
predicates.source_quote: Cough for 14 days ormore

predicates.human_label: Diarrhoea for 14 days or more (danger sign)
predicates.source_quote: Diarrhoea for 14 days or more

predicates.threshold_expression: q_has_diarrhoea == true AND q_diarrhoea_duration_days < 14 AND q_blood_in_stool == false AND p_any_danger_sign == false
predicates.human_label: Diarrhoea treatable at home (<14 days, no blood, no danger sign)
predicates.source_quote: If Diarrhoea (less than 14 days AND no blood in stool)

predicates.threshold_expression: q_has_cough == true AND p_fast_breathing_threshold == true AND ex_chest_indrawing == false AND p_any_danger_sign == false
predicates.human_label: Fast breathing treatable at home (cough + fast breathing, no chest indrawing, no danger sign)
predicates.source_quote: If fast breathing

predicates.threshold_expression: (p_age_2mo_to_12mo == true AND v_respiratory_rate_per_min >= 50) OR (p_age_12mo_to_5yr == true AND v_respiratory_rate_per_min >= 40)
predicates.human_label: Fast breathing for age
predicates.source_quote: Age 2 months up to 12 months: 50bpm ormore Age 12 months up to 5 years: 40bpm ormore

predicates.human_label: Fever for 7 days or more (danger sign)
predicates.source_quote: Fever for last 7 days or more

predicates.threshold_expression: q_has_fever == true AND q_fever_duration_days < 7 AND hx_malaria_area == true AND p_any_danger_sign == false
predicates.human_label: Fever treatable at home (<7 days, malaria area, no danger sign)
predicates.source_quote: Fever (less than 7 days) in a malaria area

predicates.threshold_expression: q_has_fever == true AND (q_convulsions == true OR ex_unusually_sleepy_or_unconscious == true OR q_not_able_to_drink_or_feed == true OR q_vomits_everything == true)
predicates.human_label: Fever with convulsions/unconscious/unable to drink/vomits everything
predicates.source_quote: If Fever AND Convulsions or Unusually sleepy or unconscious or Not able to drink or feed anything or Vomits everything

predicates.human_label: MUAC strap red - severe malnutrition
predicates.source_quote: RED reading on the MUAC strap indicates severe malnutrition

predicates.human_label: MUAC strap yellow - moderate malnutrition
predicates.source_quote: Yellow on MUAC strap: Counsel caregiver on feeding

predicates.human_label: RDT negative for malaria
predicates.source_quote: Negative

predicates.human_label: RDT positive for malaria
predicates.source_quote: If RDT is positive, give oral antimalarial AL

rules.condition: (q_cough_present == true && q_cough_duration_days >= 14) || (q_diarrhoea_present == true && q_diarrhoea_duration_days >= 14) || (q_blood_in_stool == true) || (q_fever_present == true && q_fever_duration_days >= 7) || (q_convulsions_present == true) || (q_able_to_drink_feed == false) || (q_vomits_everything == true) || (ex_chest_indrawing == true) || (ex_unusually_sleepy_unconscious == true) || (v_muac_mm < 115) || (ex_bilateral_foot_oedema == true)

outputs.p_pre_referral_first_dose_al: (q_fever_present == true) && !((q_convulsions_present == true) || (ex_unusually_sleepy_unconscious == true) || (q_able_to_drink_feed == false) || (q_vomits_everything == true)) && (q_able_to_drink_feed == true)

rules.description: ANY danger sign present (cough >=14 days, diarrhoea >=14 days, blood in stool, fever >=7 days, convulsions, unable to drink/feed, vomits everything, chest indrawing, unusually sleepy/unconscious, red MUAC <115mm, bilateral foot oedema): refer urgently to hospital. Set pre-referral treatment flags based on specific combination of danger signs.

rules.condition: p_danger_sign_present == false && q_cough_present == true && q_cough_duration_days < 14 && ex_chest_indrawing == false && ((demo_age_months >= 2 && demo_age_months < 12 && ex_respiratory_rate_bpm >= 50) || (demo_age_months >= 12 && demo_age_months < 60 && ex_respiratory_rate_bpm >= 40))
rules.description: No danger signs. Cough present (<14 days), no chest indrawing, fast breathing present (>=50 bpm for 2-12 months OR >=40 bpm for 12-60 months): classify as pneumonia. Also assess and flag co-existing uncomplicated diarrhoea and uncomplicated fever for treatment modules. Flag home care and vaccine check.

rules.condition: p_danger_sign_present == false && q_cough_present == true && q_cough_duration_days < 14 && ex_chest_indrawing == false && !((demo_age_months >= 2 && demo_age_months < 12 && ex_respiratory_rate_bpm >= 50) || (demo_age_months >= 12 && demo_age_months < 60 && ex_respiratory_rate_bpm >= 40)) && (q_diarrhoea_present == true && q_diarrhoea_duration_days < 14 && q_blood_in_stool == false)
rules.description: No danger signs. Cough present (<14 days), no chest indrawing, no fast breathing. Uncomplicated diarrhoea present (<14 days, no blood). Also check for co-existing uncomplicated fever. Flag diarrhoea treatment module, conditionally fever module, home care, and vaccine check.

rules.condition: p_danger_sign_present == false && q_cough_present == true && q_cough_duration_days < 14 && ex_chest_indrawing == false && !((demo_age_months >= 2 && demo_age_months < 12 && ex_respiratory_rate_bpm >= 50) || (demo_age_months >= 12 && demo_age_months < 60 && ex_respiratory_rate_bpm >= 40)) && (q_diarrhoea_present == false || (q_diarrhoea_present == true && q_diarrhoea_duration_days < 14 && q_blood_in_stool == false) == false) && (q_fever_present == true && q_fever_duration_days < 7 && p_malaria_endemic_area == true)
rules.description: No danger signs. Cough present (<14 days), no chest indrawing, no fast breathing, no uncomplicated diarrhoea. Uncomplicated fever present (<7 days) in malaria endemic area. Flag fever treatment (RDT) module, home care, and vaccine check.

rules.condition: p_danger_sign_present == false && (q_cough_present == false || (q_cough_present == true && q_cough_duration_days < 14 && ex_chest_indrawing == false && !((demo_age_months >= 2 && demo_age_months < 12 && ex_respiratory_rate_bpm >= 50) || (demo_age_months >= 12 && demo_age_months < 60 && ex_respiratory_rate_bpm >= 40)))) && (q_diarrhoea_present == true && q_diarrhoea_duration_days < 14 && q_blood_in_stool == false) && (q_fever_present == false || (q_fever_present == true && q_fever_duration_days < 7 && p_malaria_endemic_area == true))
rules.description: No danger signs. No pneumonia. Uncomplicated diarrhoea (<14 days, no blood). Optionally co-existing uncomplicated fever in malaria area. Flag diarrhoea and conditionally fever treatment modules, home care, and vaccine check.

rules.condition: p_danger_sign_present == false && (q_cough_present == false || (q_cough_present == true && q_cough_duration_days < 14 && ex_chest_indrawing == false && !((demo_age_months >= 2 && demo_age_months < 12 && ex_respiratory_rate_bpm >= 50) || (demo_age_months >= 12 && demo_age_months < 60 && ex_respiratory_rate_bpm >= 40)))) && (q_diarrhoea_present == false) && (q_fever_present == true && q_fever_duration_days < 7 && p_malaria_endemic_area == true)
rules.description: No danger signs. No cough or cough without fast breathing or chest indrawing. No diarrhoea. Uncomplicated fever (<7 days) in malaria endemic area. Flag fever treatment (RDT) module, home care, and vaccine check.

rules.condition: p_danger_sign_present == false && (q_cough_present == false || (q_cough_present == true && q_cough_duration_days < 14 && ex_chest_indrawing == false && !((demo_age_months >= 2 && demo_age_months < 12 && ex_respiratory_rate_bpm >= 50) || (demo_age_months >= 12 && demo_age_months < 60 && ex_respiratory_rate_bpm >= 40)))) && q_diarrhoea_present == false && (q_fever_present == false || (q_fever_present == true && (q_fever_duration_days >= 7 || p_malaria_endemic_area == false))) && (v_muac_mm < 115 || ex_bilateral_foot_oedema == true)
rules.description: No danger signs from main list, but MUAC red (<115mm) or bilateral foot oedema without any other treatable condition: severe acute malnutrition. Refer urgently to health facility. Note: v_muac_mm < 115 and bilateral foot oedema are also independently listed as danger signs in rule_1; this rule covers isolated SAM presentation.

rules.condition: p_danger_sign_present == false && (q_cough_present == false || (q_cough_present == true && q_cough_duration_days < 14 && ex_chest_indrawing == false && !((demo_age_months >= 2 && demo_age_months < 12 && ex_respiratory_rate_bpm >= 50) || (demo_age_months >= 12 && demo_age_months < 60 && ex_respiratory_rate_bpm >= 40)))) && q_diarrhoea_present == false && (q_fever_present == false || (q_fever_present == true && (q_fever_duration_days >= 7 || p_malaria_endemic_area == false))) && v_muac_mm >= 115 && v_muac_mm < 125 && ex_bilateral_foot_oedema == false
rules.description: No danger signs, no acute illness requiring treatment. MUAC yellow (115-124mm), no oedema: moderate malnutrition. Counsel on feeding. Flag vaccine check and home care advice.

rules.condition: p_danger_sign_present == false && (q_cough_present == false || (q_cough_present == true && q_cough_duration_days < 14 && ex_chest_indrawing == false && !((demo_age_months >= 2 && demo_age_months < 12 && ex_respiratory_rate_bpm >= 50) || (demo_age_months >= 12 && demo_age_months < 60 && ex_respiratory_rate_bpm >= 40)))) && q_diarrhoea_present == false && (q_fever_present == false || (q_fever_present == true && (q_fever_duration_days >= 7 || p_malaria_endemic_area == false))) && v_muac_mm >= 125 && ex_bilateral_foot_oedema == false
rules.description: No danger signs, no acute illness, MUAC green (>=125mm), no oedema: well child. Check vaccination status and provide general home care/prevention advice.

rules.condition: hx_vaccine_card_present == false

outputs.adv_vaccines_due_list: UNKNOWN - no vaccine card present; refer to health facility to verify and update vaccination record

rules.description: No vaccine card present; advise caregiver to bring card to health facility to verify vaccination status and catch up on any missed vaccines.

rules.condition: hx_vaccine_card_present == true AND demo_age_in_weeks >= 0 AND demo_age_in_weeks < 6 AND (hx_bcg_given == false OR hx_hepb_birth_given == false OR hx_opv0_given == false)

outputs.adv_vaccines_due_list: Birth vaccines due: BCG (if not given), HepB birth dose (if not given), OPV0 (if not given)

rules.description: Child is under 6 weeks and is missing one or more birth-dose vaccines (BCG, HepB birth, OPV0); refer to health facility for vaccination.

rules.condition: hx_vaccine_card_present == true AND demo_age_in_weeks >= 0 AND demo_age_in_weeks < 6 AND hx_bcg_given == true AND hx_hepb_birth_given == true AND hx_opv0_given == true
rules.description: Child is under 6 weeks and has received all birth-dose vaccines (BCG, HepB birth, OPV0); vaccines are up to date for age. Advise caregiver to return at 6 weeks for next scheduled vaccines.

rules.condition: hx_vaccine_card_present == true AND demo_age_in_weeks >= 6 AND demo_age_in_weeks < 10 AND (hx_dtp_hib1_given == false OR hx_hepb1_given == false OR hx_opv1_given == false OR hx_rtv1_given == false OR hx_pcv1_given == false)

outputs.adv_vaccines_due_list: 6-week vaccines due: DTP-Hib1 (if not given), HepB1 (if not given), OPV1 (if not given), RTV1 (if not given), PCV1 (if not given)

rules.description: Child is 6 to 9 weeks and is missing one or more 6-week vaccines (DTP-Hib1, HepB1, OPV1, RTV1, PCV1); refer to health facility for vaccination.

rules.condition: hx_vaccine_card_present == true AND demo_age_in_weeks >= 6 AND demo_age_in_weeks < 10 AND hx_dtp_hib1_given == true AND hx_hepb1_given == true AND hx_opv1_given == true AND hx_rtv1_given == true AND hx_pcv1_given == true
rules.description: Child is 6 to 9 weeks and has received all vaccines due at 6 weeks; vaccines are up to date for age. Advise caregiver to return at 10 weeks for next scheduled vaccines.

rules.condition: hx_vaccine_card_present == true AND demo_age_in_weeks >= 10 AND demo_age_in_weeks < 14 AND (hx_dtp_hib2_given == false OR hx_hepb2_given == false OR hx_opv2_given == false OR hx_rtv2_given == false OR hx_pcv2_given == false)

outputs.adv_vaccines_due_list: 10-week vaccines due: DTP-Hib2 (if not given), HepB2 (if not given), OPV2 (if not given), RTV2 (if not given), PCV2 (if not given)

rules.description: Child is 10 to 13 weeks and is missing one or more 10-week vaccines (DTP-Hib2, HepB2, OPV2, RTV2, PCV2); refer to health facility for vaccination.

rules.condition: hx_vaccine_card_present == true AND demo_age_in_weeks >= 10 AND demo_age_in_weeks < 14 AND hx_dtp_hib2_given == true AND hx_hepb2_given == true AND hx_opv2_given == true AND hx_rtv2_given == true AND hx_pcv2_given == true
rules.description: Child is 10 to 13 weeks and has received all vaccines due at 10 weeks; vaccines are up to date for age. Advise caregiver to return at 14 weeks for next scheduled vaccines.

rules.condition: hx_vaccine_card_present == true AND demo_age_in_weeks >= 14 AND demo_age_in_months < 9 AND (hx_dtp_hib3_given == false OR hx_hepb3_given == false OR hx_opv3_given == false OR hx_rtv3_given == false OR hx_pcv3_given == false)

outputs.adv_vaccines_due_list: 14-week vaccines due: DTP-Hib3 (if not given), HepB3 (if not given), OPV3 (if not given), RTV3 (if not given), PCV3 (if not given)

rules.description: Child is 14 weeks to under 9 months and is missing one or more 14-week vaccines (DTP-Hib3, HepB3, OPV3, RTV3, PCV3); refer to health facility for vaccination.

rules.condition: hx_vaccine_card_present == true AND demo_age_in_weeks >= 14 AND demo_age_in_months < 9 AND hx_dtp_hib3_given == true AND hx_hepb3_given == true AND hx_opv3_given == true AND hx_rtv3_given == true AND hx_pcv3_given == true
rules.description: Child is 14 weeks to under 9 months and has received all vaccines due at 14 weeks; vaccines are up to date for age. Advise caregiver to return at 9 months for MCV1.

rules.condition: hx_vaccine_card_present == true AND demo_age_in_months >= 9 AND demo_age_in_months < 18 AND hx_mcv1_given == false

outputs.adv_vaccines_due_list: 9-month vaccine due: MCV1 (measles-containing vaccine, first dose)

rules.description: Child is 9 to 17 months and has not received MCV1; refer to health facility for vaccination.

rules.condition: hx_vaccine_card_present == true AND demo_age_in_months >= 9 AND demo_age_in_months < 18 AND hx_mcv1_given == true
rules.description: Child is 9 to 17 months and has received MCV1; vaccines are up to date for age. Advise caregiver to return at 18 months for DTP booster and MCV2.

rules.condition: hx_vaccine_card_present == true AND demo_age_in_months >= 18 AND demo_age_in_months < 60 AND (hx_dtp_booster_given == false OR hx_mcv2_given == false)

outputs.adv_vaccines_due_list: 18-month vaccines due: DTP booster (if not given), MCV2 (measles-containing vaccine, second dose, if not given)

rules.description: Child is 18 months to under 5 years and is missing one or more 18-month vaccines (DTP booster, MCV2); refer to health facility for vaccination.

rules.condition: hx_vaccine_card_present == true AND demo_age_in_months >= 18 AND demo_age_in_months < 60 AND hx_dtp_booster_given == true AND hx_mcv2_given == true
rules.description: Child is 18 months to under 5 years and has received all vaccines in the schedule including DTP booster and MCV2; vaccines are fully up to date. Praise caregiver and confirm no further scheduled vaccines in this programme.

mod_danger_sign_check.display_name: Danger Sign Check and Referral Decision

rules.condition: hx_convulsions == true OR ex_unusually_sleepy_or_unconscious == true OR ex_not_able_to_drink_or_feed == true OR ex_vomits_everything == true

outputs.rx_pre_referral_rectal_artesunate_suppos: if (q_fever_days > 0 AND demo_age_months < 36) then 1 suppository; if (q_fever_days > 0 AND demo_age_months >= 36) then 2 suppositories; else null
outputs.ref_referral_reason: Severe danger sign: child convulsing, unconscious/unusually sleepy, unable to drink or feed, or vomiting everything. Administer rectal artesunate if fever present before referral.

rules.description: Child has a severe danger sign: convulsions, unusually sleepy or unconscious, not able to drink or feed, or vomits everything. Child cannot drink. Give pre-referral ORS and rectal artesunate if fever present (1 suppository for 2mo-3yr, 2 suppositories for 3yr-5yr). Refer urgently to hospital.

rules.condition: hx_convulsions == false AND ex_unusually_sleepy_or_unconscious == false AND ex_not_able_to_drink_or_feed == false AND ex_vomits_everything == false AND ex_chest_indrawing == true

outputs.rx_pre_referral_al_first_dose_tabs: if (q_fever_days > 0 AND p_malaria_area == true AND demo_age_months < 36) then 1 tab; if (q_fever_days > 0 AND p_malaria_area == true AND demo_age_months >= 36) then 2 tabs; else null
outputs.rx_pre_referral_amoxicillin_first_dose_t: if (demo_age_months >= 2 AND demo_age_months < 12) then 1 tab; if (demo_age_months >= 12) then 2 tabs
outputs.ref_referral_reason: Danger sign: chest indrawing present. Child can drink. Give first dose amoxicillin 250mg before referral. If fever and malaria area, also give first dose AL.

rules.description: Child has chest indrawing but can drink (no severe danger signs). Give first dose amoxicillin 250mg (1 tab for 2mo-12mo, 2 tabs for 12mo-5yr). If fever and in malaria area, also give first dose AL (1 tab for 2mo-3yr, 2 tabs for 3yr-5yr). Refer urgently to health facility.

rules.condition: hx_convulsions == false AND ex_unusually_sleepy_or_unconscious == false AND ex_not_able_to_drink_or_feed == false AND ex_vomits_everything == false AND ex_chest_indrawing == false AND (q_cough_days >= 14 OR q_diarrhoea_days >= 14 OR q_blood_in_stool == true OR q_fever_days >= 7 OR v_muac_category == 'red' OR ex_swelling_both_feet == true)

outputs.rx_pre_referral_al_first_dose_tabs: if (q_fever_days >= 7 AND p_malaria_area == true AND demo_age_months < 36) then 1 tab; if (q_fever_days >= 7 AND p_malaria_area == true AND demo_age_months >= 36) then 2 tabs; else null
outputs.ref_referral_reason: Danger sign(s) present: cough >=14 days, diarrhoea >=14 days, blood in stool, fever >=7 days, red MUAC, or bilateral foot swelling. Child can drink. Give ORS if diarrhoea present. Give first dose AL if fever >=7 days and malaria area.

rules.description: Child has one or more non-severe danger signs (cough >=14 days, diarrhoea >=14 days, blood in stool, fever >=7 days, red MUAC, or bilateral foot swelling) but can drink and has no chest indrawing. Give ORS if diarrhoea is present. If fever >=7 days and in malaria area give first dose AL. Refer urgently to health facility.

rules.condition: hx_convulsions == false AND ex_unusually_sleepy_or_unconscious == false AND ex_not_able_to_drink_or_feed == false AND ex_vomits_everything == false AND ex_chest_indrawing == false AND q_cough_days < 14 AND (q_diarrhoea_days == null OR q_diarrhoea_days < 14) AND q_blood_in_stool == false AND (q_fever_days == null OR q_fever_days < 7) AND v_muac_category != 'red' AND ex_swelling_both_feet == false
rules.description: No danger signs detected. Child does not require urgent referral from this module. Proceed to condition-specific assessment modules (diarrhoea, fever, cough/fast breathing, malnutrition). Provide standard home care advice: more fluids, continue feeding, when to return (cannot drink or feed, becomes sicker, develops blood in stool), use bednet. Follow up in 3 days.

rules.condition: q_has_diarrhoea == true && q_diarrhoea_days >= 14
rules.description: Diarrhoea lasting 14 or more days is a danger sign. Give ORS as pre-referral treatment and refer urgently to health facility.

rules.condition: q_has_diarrhoea == true && q_blood_in_stool == true
rules.description: Blood in stool is a danger sign. Give ORS as pre-referral treatment and refer urgently to health facility.

rules.condition: q_has_diarrhoea == true && (ex_not_able_to_drink_or_feed == true || ex_vomits_everything == true || ex_unusually_sleepy_or_unconscious == true || ex_convulsions == true)

outputs.ref_reason: General danger sign present with diarrhoea (unable to drink/feed, vomits everything, unusually sleepy/unconscious, or convulsions)

rules.description: General danger sign present alongside diarrhoea (not able to drink/feed, vomits everything, unusually sleepy or unconscious, convulsions). Give ORS as pre-referral and refer urgently.

rules.condition: q_has_diarrhoea == true && (ex_chest_indrawing == true || v_muac_category == 'red' || ex_swelling_both_feet == true || q_cough_days >= 14 || q_fever_days >= 7)

outputs.ref_reason: Other danger sign present with diarrhoea (chest indrawing, red MUAC, bilateral foot oedema, cough >= 14 days, or fever >= 7 days)

rules.description: Other danger sign present alongside diarrhoea (chest indrawing, red MUAC, bilateral foot oedema, cough >= 14 days, fever >= 7 days). Give ORS as pre-referral and refer urgently.

rules.condition: q_has_diarrhoea == true && q_diarrhoea_days < 14 && q_blood_in_stool == false && ex_not_able_to_drink_or_feed == false && ex_vomits_everything == false && ex_unusually_sleepy_or_unconscious == false && ex_convulsions == false && ex_chest_indrawing == false && v_muac_category != 'red' && ex_swelling_both_feet == false && q_cough_days < 14 && q_fever_days < 7 && demo_age_months >= 2 && demo_age_months < 6

outputs.rx_zinc_dose_label: Zinc sulfate 20mg tablet - half tablet (10mg) once daily for 10 days

rules.description: Uncomplicated diarrhoea (< 14 days, no blood in stool, no danger signs) in child aged 2 to < 6 months. Give ORS and zinc half tablet (10mg) once daily for 10 days (5 tablets total). Provide home care advice and follow up in 3 days.

rules.condition: q_has_diarrhoea == true && q_diarrhoea_days < 14 && q_blood_in_stool == false && ex_not_able_to_drink_or_feed == false && ex_vomits_everything == false && ex_unusually_sleepy_or_unconscious == false && ex_convulsions == false && ex_chest_indrawing == false && v_muac_category != 'red' && ex_swelling_both_feet == false && q_cough_days < 14 && q_fever_days < 7 && demo_age_months >= 6 && demo_age_months < 60

outputs.rx_zinc_dose_label: Zinc sulfate 20mg tablet - 1 tablet (20mg) once daily for 10 days

rules.description: Uncomplicated diarrhoea (< 14 days, no blood in stool, no danger signs) in child aged 6 months to < 5 years. Give ORS and zinc 1 tablet (20mg) once daily for 10 days (10 tablets total). Provide home care advice and follow up in 3 days.

rules.condition: p_fast_breathing == true AND ex_chest_indrawing == true AND (ex_unable_to_drink_or_feed == true OR ex_vomits_everything == true OR ex_convulsions == true OR ex_unusually_sleepy_or_unconscious == true)

outputs.rx_amoxicillin_dose_description: Pre-referral: 1 tablet of amoxicillin 250mg as single dose before referral (2mo-12mo) OR 2 tablets as single dose (12mo-5yr)
outputs.ref_reason: Chest indrawing with danger sign (unable to drink/feed, vomits everything, convulsions, or unusually sleepy/unconscious) - refer urgently with pre-referral amoxicillin

rules.description: Fast breathing WITH chest indrawing AND a danger sign meaning child cannot drink/feed or vomits everything or has convulsions or is unusually sleepy/unconscious: give pre-referral first dose amoxicillin and refer urgently to hospital

rules.condition: p_fast_breathing == true AND ex_chest_indrawing == true AND ex_unable_to_drink_or_feed == false AND ex_vomits_everything == false AND ex_convulsions == false AND ex_unusually_sleepy_or_unconscious == false

outputs.rx_amoxicillin_dose_description: Pre-referral: 1 tablet of amoxicillin 250mg as single dose before referral (2mo-12mo) OR 2 tablets as single dose (12mo-5yr)
outputs.ref_reason: Chest indrawing - refer to health facility with pre-referral amoxicillin (child can drink)

rules.description: Fast breathing WITH chest indrawing but NO critical danger signs and child can drink: give pre-referral first dose amoxicillin and refer urgently to health facility

rules.condition: p_fast_breathing == true AND ex_chest_indrawing == false AND (ex_unable_to_drink_or_feed == true OR ex_vomits_everything == true OR ex_convulsions == true OR ex_unusually_sleepy_or_unconscious == true OR v_muac_color == 'red' OR ex_bilateral_foot_oedema == true OR q_cough_duration_days >= 14)

outputs.ref_reason: Fast breathing with additional danger sign or cough >=14 days or red MUAC or bilateral foot oedema - refer urgently to hospital

rules.description: Fast breathing WITHOUT chest indrawing BUT with a general danger sign (unable to drink/feed, vomits everything, convulsions, unusually sleepy/unconscious) OR cough >=14 days OR red MUAC OR bilateral foot oedema: refer urgently to hospital without amoxicillin treatment (danger sign takes priority)

rules.condition: p_fast_breathing == true AND ex_chest_indrawing == false AND ex_unable_to_drink_or_feed == false AND ex_vomits_everything == false AND ex_convulsions == false AND ex_unusually_sleepy_or_unconscious == false AND v_muac_color != 'red' AND ex_bilateral_foot_oedema == false AND q_cough_duration_days < 14 AND demo_age_in_months >= 2 AND demo_age_in_months < 12

outputs.rx_amoxicillin_dose_description: Amoxicillin 250mg: 1 tablet twice daily for 5 days (10 tablets total) - age 2 to 12 months

rules.description: Fast breathing, no chest indrawing, no danger signs, age 2-12 months: treat at home with amoxicillin 250mg 1 tablet twice daily x5 days (10 tablets total), home care advice, follow up in 3 days

rules.condition: p_fast_breathing == true AND ex_chest_indrawing == false AND ex_unable_to_drink_or_feed == false AND ex_vomits_everything == false AND ex_convulsions == false AND ex_unusually_sleepy_or_unconscious == false AND v_muac_color != 'red' AND ex_bilateral_foot_oedema == false AND q_cough_duration_days < 14 AND demo_age_in_months >= 12 AND demo_age_in_months < 60

outputs.rx_amoxicillin_dose_description: Amoxicillin 250mg: 2 tablets twice daily for 5 days (20 tablets total) - age 12 months to 5 years

rules.description: Fast breathing, no chest indrawing, no danger signs, age 12 months to 5 years: treat at home with amoxicillin 250mg 2 tablets twice daily x5 days (20 tablets total), home care advice, follow up in 3 days

rules.condition: q_has_fever == true AND q_fever_days >= 7
rules.description: Fever lasting 7 or more days is a danger sign requiring urgent referral to health facility regardless of other findings.

rules.condition: q_has_fever == true AND q_fever_days < 7 AND p_malaria_area == true AND (q_convulsions == true OR ex_unconscious == true) AND demo_age_months >= 2 AND demo_age_months < 36
rules.description: Fever <7 days with convulsions or unconsciousness in child 2-35 months in malaria area: give 1 rectal artesunate suppository as pre-referral treatment and refer urgently.

rules.condition: q_has_fever == true AND q_fever_days < 7 AND p_malaria_area == true AND (q_convulsions == true OR ex_unconscious == true) AND demo_age_months >= 36 AND demo_age_months < 60
rules.description: Fever <7 days with convulsions or unconsciousness in child 36-59 months in malaria area: give 2 rectal artesunate suppositories as pre-referral treatment and refer urgently.

rules.condition: q_has_fever == true AND q_fever_days < 7 AND p_malaria_area == true AND q_convulsions == false AND ex_unconscious == false AND (ex_unusually_sleepy == true OR q_vomits_everything == true OR q_able_to_drink == false) AND demo_age_months >= 2 AND demo_age_months < 36
rules.description: Fever <7 days with unusually sleepy, vomits everything, or unable to drink (cannot take oral treatment) in child 2-35 months in malaria area: give 1 rectal artesunate suppository as pre-referral treatment and refer urgently.

rules.condition: q_has_fever == true AND q_fever_days < 7 AND p_malaria_area == true AND q_convulsions == false AND ex_unconscious == false AND (ex_unusually_sleepy == true OR q_vomits_everything == true OR q_able_to_drink == false) AND demo_age_months >= 36 AND demo_age_months < 60
rules.description: Fever <7 days with unusually sleepy, vomits everything, or unable to drink (cannot take oral treatment) in child 36-59 months in malaria area: give 2 rectal artesunate suppositories as pre-referral treatment and refer urgently.

rules.condition: q_has_fever == true AND q_fever_days < 7 AND p_malaria_area == true AND q_convulsions == false AND ex_unconscious == false AND ex_unusually_sleepy == false AND q_vomits_everything == false AND q_able_to_drink == true AND (ex_chest_indrawing == true OR ex_bilateral_foot_oedema == true OR v_muac_category == 'red') AND lab_rdt_result == 'positive' AND demo_age_months >= 2 AND demo_age_months < 36
rules.description: Fever <7 days, RDT positive, child can drink but has another danger sign (chest indrawing, bilateral foot oedema, or red MUAC) in 2-35 months: give first dose AL (1 tab) as pre-referral and refer urgently to health facility.

rules.condition: q_has_fever == true AND q_fever_days < 7 AND p_malaria_area == true AND q_convulsions == false AND ex_unconscious == false AND ex_unusually_sleepy == false AND q_vomits_everything == false AND q_able_to_drink == true AND (ex_chest_indrawing == true OR ex_bilateral_foot_oedema == true OR v_muac_category == 'red') AND lab_rdt_result == 'positive' AND demo_age_months >= 36 AND demo_age_months < 60
rules.description: Fever <7 days, RDT positive, child can drink but has another danger sign (chest indrawing, bilateral foot oedema, or red MUAC) in 36-59 months: give first dose AL (2 tabs) as pre-referral and refer urgently to health facility.

rules.condition: q_has_fever == true AND q_fever_days < 7 AND p_malaria_area == true AND q_convulsions == false AND ex_unconscious == false AND ex_unusually_sleepy == false AND q_vomits_everything == false AND q_able_to_drink == true AND (ex_chest_indrawing == true OR ex_bilateral_foot_oedema == true OR v_muac_category == 'red') AND lab_rdt_result == 'negative' AND demo_age_months >= 2 AND demo_age_months < 60
rules.description: Fever <7 days, RDT negative, child can drink but has another danger sign (chest indrawing, bilateral foot oedema, or red MUAC): refer urgently to health facility without AL.

rules.condition: q_has_fever == true AND q_fever_days < 7 AND p_malaria_area == true AND q_convulsions == false AND ex_unconscious == false AND ex_unusually_sleepy == false AND q_vomits_everything == false AND q_able_to_drink == true AND ex_chest_indrawing == false AND ex_bilateral_foot_oedema == false AND v_muac_category != 'red' AND lab_rdt_result == 'positive' AND demo_age_months >= 2 AND demo_age_months < 36
rules.description: Fever <7 days, RDT positive, no danger signs, no other referral criteria, child 2-35 months: treat with AL 1 tab twice daily for 3 days (6 tabs total), give home care advice, and follow up in 3 days.

rules.condition: q_has_fever == true AND q_fever_days < 7 AND p_malaria_area == true AND q_convulsions == false AND ex_unconscious == false AND ex_unusually_sleepy == false AND q_vomits_everything == false AND q_able_to_drink == true AND ex_chest_indrawing == false AND ex_bilateral_foot_oedema == false AND v_muac_category != 'red' AND lab_rdt_result == 'positive' AND demo_age_months >= 36 AND demo_age_months < 60
rules.description: Fever <7 days, RDT positive, no danger signs, no other referral criteria, child 36-59 months: treat with AL 2 tabs twice daily for 3 days (12 tabs total), give home care advice, and follow up in 3 days.

rules.condition: q_has_fever == true AND q_fever_days < 7 AND p_malaria_area == true AND q_convulsions == false AND ex_unconscious == false AND ex_unusually_sleepy == false AND q_vomits_everything == false AND q_able_to_drink == true AND ex_chest_indrawing == false AND ex_bilateral_foot_oedema == false AND v_muac_category != 'red' AND lab_rdt_result == 'negative' AND demo_age_months >= 2 AND demo_age_months < 60
rules.description: Fever <7 days, RDT negative, no danger signs, no other referral criteria: malaria not confirmed, do not give AL, give home care advice, and follow up in 3 days to reassess cause of fever.

rules.condition: q_has_fever == true AND q_fever_days < 7 AND p_malaria_area == false AND demo_age_months >= 2 AND demo_age_months < 60
rules.description: Fever <7 days but child is NOT in a malaria area: RDT and AL are not indicated. Provide home care advice and follow up in 3 days. Other modules will assess other causes of fever.

mod_home_care_advice.display_name: Home Care Advice and Follow-Up Scheduling

rules.condition: p_refer_urgently == true AND p_pre_referral_given == true

outputs.adv_home_care_summary: Child requires urgent referral. Pre-referral treatment has been given. Escort child to hospital immediately. Do not delay for home care counselling.

rules.description: Child has danger sign(s) and urgent referral is indicated with pre-referral treatment already given. Skip home care advice; focus on immediate transfer to hospital.

rules.condition: p_refer_urgently == true AND p_pre_referral_given == false

outputs.adv_home_care_summary: Child requires urgent referral. Administer appropriate pre-referral treatment before transfer and escort child to hospital immediately.

rules.description: Child has danger sign(s) and urgent referral is indicated but pre-referral treatment not yet recorded as given. Flag for pre-referral treatment and immediate hospital transfer.

rules.condition: p_refer_urgently == false AND p_malnutrition_severe == true

outputs.adv_home_care_summary: Child has severe acute malnutrition (red MUAC or bilateral foot oedema). Refer to health facility for assessment and management. Do not delay.

rules.description: Child has severe acute malnutrition (MUAC red or bilateral oedema) without other urgent danger signs already triggering referral. Refer to health facility; home care advice is not appropriate primary action.

rules.condition: p_refer_urgently == false AND p_malnutrition_severe == false AND p_diarrhoea_treated == true AND p_fever_treated == false AND p_fast_breathing_treated == false AND p_malnutrition_moderate == false AND p_rdt_negative == false

outputs.adv_home_care_summary: Child treated for diarrhoea with ORS and zinc. Advise caregiver: give extra fluids (ORS after each loose stool), continue breastfeeding and feeding, give zinc daily for 10 days. Return immediately if child cannot drink, becomes sicker, or has blood in stool. Use bednet every night. Schedule follow-up in 3 days.

rules.description: Child treated for diarrhoea only (ORS + zinc). Provide home care advice on fluids, feeding, when to return, bednet use. Schedule 3-day follow-up.

rules.condition: p_refer_urgently == false AND p_malnutrition_severe == false AND p_fever_treated == true AND lab_rdt_result == 'positive' AND p_diarrhoea_treated == false AND p_fast_breathing_treated == false AND p_malnutrition_moderate == false

outputs.adv_home_care_summary: Child treated for malaria fever (RDT positive, AL given). Advise caregiver: give extra fluids, continue feeding, complete full course of AL. Return immediately if child cannot drink, has convulsions, becomes unusually sleepy, or becomes sicker. Sleep under bednet every night. Schedule follow-up in 3 days.

rules.description: Child treated for fever with confirmed malaria (RDT positive, AL prescribed). Provide home care advice on fluids, feeding, completing AL course, when to return, bednet. Schedule 3-day follow-up.

rules.condition: p_refer_urgently == false AND p_malnutrition_severe == false AND p_fever_treated == true AND lab_rdt_result == 'negative' AND p_diarrhoea_treated == false AND p_fast_breathing_treated == false AND p_malnutrition_moderate == false

outputs.adv_home_care_summary: Child has fever with RDT negative result (malaria not confirmed). No antimalarial given. Advise caregiver: give extra fluids, continue feeding. Return immediately if child cannot drink, has convulsions, becomes unusually sleepy, or becomes sicker. Sleep under bednet every night. Mandatory follow-up in 3 days to reassess.

rules.description: Child has fever but RDT negative. No antimalarial given. Provide home care advice and mandatory 3-day follow-up to reassess fever cause.

rules.condition: p_refer_urgently == false AND p_malnutrition_severe == false AND p_fast_breathing_treated == true AND p_diarrhoea_treated == false AND p_fever_treated == false AND p_malnutrition_moderate == false

adv_return_immediately_signs: breathing becomes harder or chest indrawing develops
outputs.adv_home_care_summary: Child treated for fast breathing (pneumonia) with amoxicillin. Advise caregiver: give extra fluids, continue feeding, complete full 5-day course of amoxicillin. Return immediately if child cannot drink, breathing becomes harder, chest indrawing develops, or child becomes sicker. Sleep under bednet every night. Schedule follow-up in 3 days.

rules.description: Child treated for fast breathing (non-severe pneumonia) with amoxicillin. Provide home care advice on fluids, feeding, completing antibiotic course, when to return, bednet. Schedule 3-day follow-up.

rules.condition: p_refer_urgently == false AND p_malnutrition_severe == false AND p_diarrhoea_treated == true AND p_fever_treated == true AND lab_rdt_result == 'positive' AND p_fast_breathing_treated == false AND p_malnutrition_moderate == false

outputs.adv_home_care_summary: Child treated for diarrhoea (ORS + zinc) and malaria fever (RDT positive, AL given). Advise caregiver: give extra fluids including ORS after each loose stool, continue feeding, complete full course of AL and zinc for 10 days. Return immediately if child cannot drink, has blood in stool, convulsions, becomes unusually sleepy, or becomes sicker. Sleep under bednet every night. Schedule follow-up in 3 days.

rules.description: Child treated for both diarrhoea and confirmed malaria fever. Provide combined home care advice covering ORS, zinc completion, AL completion, when to return, bednet. Schedule 3-day follow-up.

rules.condition: p_refer_urgently == false AND p_malnutrition_severe == false AND p_diarrhoea_treated == true AND p_fast_breathing_treated == true AND p_fever_treated == false AND p_malnutrition_moderate == false

adv_return_immediately_signs: breathing becomes harder or chest indrawing develops
outputs.adv_home_care_summary: Child treated for diarrhoea (ORS + zinc) and fast breathing (amoxicillin). Advise caregiver: give extra fluids including ORS after each loose stool, continue feeding, complete full 5-day amoxicillin course and zinc for 10 days. Return immediately if child cannot drink, blood in stool, breathing becomes harder, chest indrawing develops, or becomes sicker. Sleep under bednet. Schedule follow-up in 3 days.

rules.description: Child treated for both diarrhoea and fast breathing. Provide combined home care advice. Schedule 3-day follow-up.

rules.condition: p_refer_urgently == false AND p_malnutrition_severe == false AND p_fast_breathing_treated == true AND p_fever_treated == true AND lab_rdt_result == 'positive' AND p_diarrhoea_treated == false AND p_malnutrition_moderate == false

adv_return_immediately_signs: breathing becomes harder or chest indrawing develops
outputs.adv_home_care_summary: Child treated for fast breathing (amoxicillin) and malaria fever (RDT positive, AL given). Advise caregiver: give extra fluids, continue feeding, complete full 5-day amoxicillin course and 3-day AL course. Return immediately if child cannot drink, breathing becomes harder, convulsions, becomes unusually sleepy, or becomes sicker. Sleep under bednet. Schedule follow-up in 3 days.

rules.description: Child treated for both fast breathing and confirmed malaria. Provide combined home care advice. Schedule 3-day follow-up.

rules.condition: p_refer_urgently == false AND p_malnutrition_severe == false AND p_diarrhoea_treated == true AND p_fast_breathing_treated == true AND p_fever_treated == true AND lab_rdt_result == 'positive' AND p_malnutrition_moderate == false

adv_return_immediately_signs: breathing becomes harder or chest indrawing develops
outputs.adv_home_care_summary: Child treated for diarrhoea (ORS + zinc), fast breathing (amoxicillin), and malaria fever (RDT positive, AL). Advise caregiver: give extra fluids including ORS after each loose stool, continue feeding, complete all medications as prescribed. Return immediately for any danger sign. Sleep under bednet. Schedule follow-up in 3 days.

rules.description: Child treated for diarrhoea, fast breathing, and confirmed malaria. Provide comprehensive home care advice. Schedule 3-day follow-up.

rules.condition: p_refer_urgently == false AND p_malnutrition_severe == false AND p_malnutrition_moderate == true AND p_any_illness_treated == false AND p_diarrhoea_treated == false AND p_fever_treated == false AND p_fast_breathing_treated == false

outputs.adv_home_care_summary: Child has yellow MUAC (moderate malnutrition risk). No acute illness requiring treatment identified. Counsel caregiver on appropriate feeding practices: increase frequency and variety of food, continue breastfeeding if applicable. Advise on extra fluids. Return immediately if child cannot drink, becomes sicker. Use bednet. Schedule follow-up in 3 days to reassess nutrition status.

rules.description: Child has yellow MUAC (moderate malnutrition) without acute treatable illness. Provide feeding counselling, fluid advice, when to return, bednet advice. Schedule 3-day follow-up for nutrition reassessment.

rules.condition: p_refer_urgently == false AND p_malnutrition_severe == false AND p_malnutrition_moderate == true AND p_any_illness_treated == true

outputs.adv_home_care_summary: Child treated for illness and has yellow MUAC (moderate malnutrition risk). Advise caregiver: give extra fluids, continue and improve feeding (increase frequency and variety), complete all prescribed medications. Counsel on appropriate feeding to improve nutritional status. Return immediately if child cannot drink, becomes sicker, or has blood in stool. Sleep under bednet. Schedule follow-up in 3 days.

rules.description: Child treated for acute illness and also has yellow MUAC. Provide home care advice including illness-specific guidance plus feeding counselling. Schedule 3-day follow-up.

rules.condition: p_refer_urgently == false AND p_malnutrition_severe == false AND p_malnutrition_moderate == false AND p_any_illness_treated == false AND p_diarrhoea_treated == false AND p_fever_treated == false AND p_fast_breathing_treated == false AND p_vaccine_check_needed == true

outputs.adv_home_care_summary: Child has no acute illness requiring treatment. Vaccination status check has identified missing vaccines. Refer caregiver to nearest health facility for vaccination. Advise on general home care: extra fluids, continue feeding, sleep under bednet. Return immediately if child cannot drink, develops fever or fast breathing, or becomes sicker.

rules.description: Child has no acute illness but has missing vaccinations identified. Provide general home care advice and refer for vaccination. No 3-day follow-up required for illness but vaccination referral made.

rules.condition: p_refer_urgently == false AND p_malnutrition_severe == false AND p_malnutrition_moderate == false AND p_any_illness_treated == false AND p_diarrhoea_treated == false AND p_fever_treated == false AND p_fast_breathing_treated == false AND p_vaccine_check_needed == false

outputs.adv_home_care_summary: Child assessed with no acute illness, no malnutrition, and vaccinations up to date. Provide general home care advice: give extra fluids, continue feeding, sleep under bednet every night. Return immediately if child cannot drink, develops fever or fast breathing, has blood in stool, or becomes sicker. No scheduled follow-up required at this time.

rules.description: Child assessed with no illness, no malnutrition, vaccinations current. Provide general preventive home care advice. No follow-up scheduled.

rules.condition: demo_age_months >= 6 AND demo_age_months < 60 AND v_muac_colour == 'red' AND ex_bilateral_foot_oedema == false
rules.description: Child 6mo-5yr with red MUAC (<115mm) and no bilateral foot oedema: severe acute malnutrition. Refer urgently to hospital.

rules.condition: demo_age_months >= 6 AND demo_age_months < 60 AND v_muac_colour == 'red' AND ex_bilateral_foot_oedema == true
rules.description: Child 6mo-5yr with red MUAC (<115mm) AND bilateral foot oedema: severe acute malnutrition with oedema. Refer urgently to hospital.

rules.condition: demo_age_months >= 6 AND demo_age_months < 60 AND v_muac_colour != 'red' AND ex_bilateral_foot_oedema == true
rules.description: Child 6mo-5yr with bilateral foot oedema (regardless of MUAC colour): severe malnutrition due to oedema. Refer urgently to hospital.

rules.condition: demo_age_months >= 6 AND demo_age_months < 60 AND v_muac_colour == 'yellow' AND ex_bilateral_foot_oedema == false
rules.description: Child 6mo-5yr with yellow MUAC (115-124mm) and no bilateral foot oedema: moderate acute malnutrition. Counsel on feeding and schedule follow-up.

rules.condition: demo_age_months >= 6 AND demo_age_months < 60 AND v_muac_colour == 'green' AND ex_bilateral_foot_oedema == false
rules.description: Child 6mo-5yr with green MUAC (>=125mm) and no bilateral foot oedema: no acute malnutrition detected. No additional malnutrition action required.

rules.condition: demo_age_months < 6 OR demo_age_months >= 60
rules.description: Child is outside the 6mo-5yr age range for MUAC-based malnutrition screening. Module marked done without malnutrition classification.

rows.description: Short-circuit: if any module has flagged priority exit (danger sign found), go to urgent referral pathway
Startup: run Identify Problems - ASK and LOOK first
Danger sign module: Danger Sign Check and Referral Decision
Clinical module: Diarrhoea Treatment - ORS and Zinc
Clinical module: Fast Breathing Treatment - Amoxicillin
Clinical module: Fever/Malaria Treatment - RDT and AL
Clinical module: Malnutrition Screening - MUAC and Oedema
Closing: Home Care Advice and Follow-Up Scheduling

phrase_bank.text: Advise to give 2nd dose after 8 hours and to give dose twice daily for 2 more days.
phrase_bank.source_quote: Advise to give 2nd dose after 8 hours and to give dose twice daily for 2 more days.

phrase_bank.text: All medicines have an expiration date, after which they may not be effective or could be harmful.
phrase_bank.source_quote: All medicines have an expiration date, after which they may not be effective or could be harmful

phrase_bank.text: Emphasize that it is important to give the amoxicillin for the full 5 days, even if the child feels better.
phrase_bank.source_quote: Emphasize that it is important to give the amoxicillin for the full 5 days, even if the child feels better.

phrase_bank.text: Counsel caregiver on feeding or refer the child to a supplementary feeding programme, if available.
phrase_bank.source_quote: Counsel caregiver on feeding or refer the child to a supplementary feeding programme, if available

phrase_bank.text: The caregiver should give the first dose of treatment in your presence.
phrase_bank.source_quote: the caregiver should give the first dose of treatment in your presence

phrase_bank.text: Advise caregiver to give more fluids and continue feeding.
phrase_bank.source_quote: Advise caregiver to give more fluids and continue feeding

phrase_bank.text: Advise caregiver, if needed: WHEN and WHERE is the next vaccine to be given?
phrase_bank.source_quote: Advise caregiver, if needed: WHEN and WHERE is the next vaccine to be given?

phrase_bank.text: Advise caregiver on sleeping under a bednet (ITN).
phrase_bank.source_quote: Advise caregiver on sleeping under a bednet (ITN)

phrase_bank.text: Advise on when to return: go to nearest health facility immediately if child cannot drink or feed, becomes sicker, or has blood in the stool.
phrase_bank.source_quote: Advise on when to return

phrase_bank.text: Give zinc for the full 10 days, even if the diarrhoea stops.
phrase_bank.source_quote: it is important to give the zinc for the full ten days, even if the diarrhoea stops

phrase_bank.text: Follow up child in 3 days.
phrase_bank.source_quote: Follow up child in 3 days

phrase_bank.text: Follow up child on return at least once a week until child is well.
phrase_bank.source_quote: FOLLOW UP child on return at least once a week until child is well

phrase_bank.text: Explain why the child needs to go to the health facility.
phrase_bank.source_quote: Explain why the child needs to go to the health facility

phrase_bank.text: Arrange transportation, and help solve other difficulties in referral.
phrase_bank.source_quote: Arrange transportation, and help solve other difficulties in referral

phrase_bank.text: If any danger sign, REFER URGENTLY to health facility.
phrase_bank.source_quote: If any danger sign, REFER URGENTLY to health facility

phrase_bank.text: Write a referral note.
phrase_bank.source_quote: Write a referral note

phrase_bank.text: If RDT is positive, give oral antimalarial AL (Artemether-Lumefantrine). Give twice daily for 3 days.
phrase_bank.source_quote: If RDT is positive, give oral antimalarial AL (Artemether-Lumefantrine)

phrase_bank.text: Give oral antibiotic (amoxicillin tablet - 250mg). Give twice daily for 5 days.
phrase_bank.source_quote: Give oral antibiotic (amoxicillin tablet - 250mg) Give twice daily for 5 days

phrase_bank.text: Give ORS. Help caregiver give child ORS solution in front of you until child is no longer thirsty.
phrase_bank.source_quote: Give ORS. Help caregiver give child ORS solution in front of you until child is no longer thirsty.

phrase_bank.text: Give zinc supplement. Give 1 dose daily for 10 days.
phrase_bank.source_quote: Give zinc supplement. Give 1 dose daily for 10 days

phrase_bank.text: Give rectal artesunate suppository (100 mg) for pre-referral treatment of fever with severe danger signs.
phrase_bank.source_quote: Give rectal artesunate suppository (100 mg)

rules.condition: q_has_diarrhoea == true AND q_has_fever == true AND hx_malaria_area == true AND p_rdt_positive == true AND p_any_danger_sign == false

outputs.description: If a child has diarrhoea and malaria, give the child: ORS, zinc supplement, and an oral antimalarial for treatment at home

rules.source_quote: if a child has diarrhoea and malaria, give the child: ORS, zinc supplement, and an oral antimalarial for treatment at home.
